## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Deepgram and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and product-specific SEO (PSEO) initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is on track with 3 articles ready to publish and 5 more in progress](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [PSEO strategy for language pages is being refined, focusing on use cases rather than case studies](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [Content pruning strategy needs careful consideration to balance traffic loss with improved quality](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [New performance tracking methods are needed to demonstrate the value of content strategy changes](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [3 articles ready for publishing (Wed-Fri)](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Cover images, meta titles, descriptions, and URL slugs available in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [5 new blogs in progress, to be ready by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Jose to handle staging, maintaining flexible publishing schedule](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Keyword targeting mix: high-volume (top of funnel) and low-volume (product-specific, high intent)](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)

### SEO Performance Tracking

  - [Looker dashboard to show URL-specific performance within 4-6 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [First published blog showing 37 sessions, 48% engagement rate](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
  - [Weekly performance reporting to ramp up as more content is published](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [Scrunch dashboard walkthrough postponed, PDF report to be shared via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

### PSEO Strategy for Language Pages

  - [Shift from case studies to use cases due to low language coverage](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [Hasan drafting wireframes inspired by Eleven Labs' approach](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [Need to connect with Patricia for web development insights](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)
  - [Focus on reusing existing CMS components where possible](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
  - [Potential for one interactive component, rest mainly copy and external links](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)

### Content Pruning Strategy

  - [Concern about organic traffic drop as AI apps and LearnPages are pruned](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [Need to demonstrate value of pruning to stakeholders](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [Suggestion to prune in sets (e.g., 20-30 blogs at a time) to minimize impact](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [Redirects to be implemented for pruned pages](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
  - [Importance of tracking MQLs and quality sessions post-pruning](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Hasan to share PSEO wireframes and copy doc in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
  - [Erik to provide PSEO intake form details to team](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
  - [Schedule meeting with Patricia to discuss CMS components and publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
  - [Aida to prepare Notion doc explaining pruning strategy and its business impact](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
  - [Aida to consult with Jacob on best practices for measuring quality sessions post-pruning](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [Team to implement internal linking strategy for new and existing content](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Aida to send PDF of Scrunch report via Slack and provide full walkthrough next week](https://fathom.video/share/mbH6h8mrNbzrtbuLYTgPgkXxsjs1oBPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
